name: Intimidator Hybrid 251 SR
comment: Enjoy a moving head that can meet all your needs with a true all-in-one light fixture. Intimidator Hybrid 251SR seamlessly morphs from spot to beam to wash. It has 12 + open and split colors with continuous scroll at variable speeds. Harness all the power that moving heads have to offer with Intimidator Hybrid 251SR.

capabilities.comment: Slow Open Fast Close  S > F - Strobe Pulse Closed
Fast Open Slow Close  S > F - Strobe Pulse Open
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
BO On Color Wheel Movement - Blackout

BO On P/T/Color/Gobo Wheel Movement - Blackout
